campaign_status.current_focus: Drive waitlist sign‑ups for Cradle Adapter V1

today_priority: Produce and publish the approved Reel (post_id: 2026-05-16-REEL-ATIONS) to capture the precision‑engineering buzz and start collecting WRIST comments.

blocked_items.reason: Reel has not been created; manual reel state is WAITING.
blocked_items.required_fix: Assemble footage per Visual Brief shot list, apply edit plan, overlay approved on‑screen text, export final video.

blocked_items.reason: Post not uploaded or scheduled; manual post state is WAITING.
blocked_items.required_fix: Upload exported Reel to Instagram and TikTok, apply caption A (with disclaimer), set CTA to comment “WRIST”, and schedule for immediate publishing.

manual_reel_actions: Compile macro and detail shots as defined in the shot list.
Edit sequence per edit_plan, add on‑screen text, ensure 20‑second runtime.
Export in Instagram/TikTok compatible format and store path in manual_reel_state.
manual_post_actions: Insert approved caption (option A) including the independent‑brand disclaimer.
Add first‑comment prompt: “Comment WRIST for the waitlist link.”
Publish on both platforms now (or schedule within the next hour).
next_3_actions: Create the Reel video according to Visual Brief and approved copy.
Export and attach the video file to the manual reel record.
Upload the Reel to Instagram and TikTok with caption A and go live.
do_not_do: Mention Swatch, Audemars Piguet, or any affiliation.
Use hype‑style language or generic startup clichés.
success_condition: Within 24 hours of publishing, achieve ≥200 comments containing the word “WRIST” (indicating waitlist interest).
